intro.title: The Weekend
intro.copy: A celebration of love, friendship, and new beginnings. We cannot wait to share these moments with you.

events.title: Welcome Drinks
events.description: Join us for cocktails and hors d'oeuvres to kick off the celebration.
events.location: The Terrace at Blue Water, Crete, Greece

image.alt: Coastal terrace lounge at sunset with cocktails, string lights, and the ocean in the background.

events.title: The Ceremony
events.description: Our ceremony will be held in the sunken garden. Please arrive by 4:15 PM to find your seats.

image.alt: Outdoor garden ceremony with white chairs, sage greenery, and a minimalist floral arch.

events.title: The Reception
events.description: Cocktails followed by a seated dinner and dancing under the stars in the Grand Pavilion.

image.alt: Elegant reception table with crystal glassware, dusty rose napkins, candles, and white flowers.

events.title: Farewell Brunch
events.description: A casual drop-in brunch before everyone heads home. Coffee, pastries, and memories.
events.location: The Sunroom at Blue Water, Crete, Greece

image.alt: Bright brunch table with coffee, pastries, fresh fruit, and soft morning light.
